      · simpa [σ, h1, Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite] using (h.subst (Set.not_mem_empty p))

    obtain ⟨f, s, hf⟩ := Module.Finite.exists_linearMap_localizedModule_eq' S M N (g.trans (LocalizedModule.pi S _).symm).toLinearMap

set sigma := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have h_fin : sigma.Finite := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support

    rw [this, hf]; exact (equiv.trans h_N_S.symm).bijective.comp (LinearMap.smul_bijective _ (Submonoid.smul_mem S s s.2))

obtain ⟨hfin, -⟩ := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support
  set s := Module.support A M ∩ {p | (p : PrimeSpectrum A).1.primeHeight = 1}
  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hse | hsn
  · refine ⟨Empty, inferInstance, (fun i => i.elim), (fun i => i.elim), (fun i => i.elim), (fun i => i.elim), ?_⟩

    have hPID := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (fun p hp => hp.2) hsn hfin

  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with h | hne
  · use PEmpty, inferInstance, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_zero_iff_isPseudoNull]
    intro p hp; rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]; contrapose! h; exact ⟨p, hp.1, hp.2, h⟩
  · let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl

    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := IsLocalization.surjective_on_linearMap S M N (eMS.trans (by sorry))

let σ := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have hσ : σ.Finite := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support
  rcases σ.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hσe | hσne
  · refine ⟨PEmpty, inferInstance, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, ?_⟩
    have : Module.isPseudoNull A M := by
      rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
      intro p hp
      rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff, ← Module.not_mem_support_iff_of_finite]
      intro hmem
      rw [Decidable.le_iff_eq_or_lt, ENat.lt_one_iff_eq_zero] at hp
      rcases hp with hp | hp
      · have : p ∈ Module.support A M := hmem
        have := hMT.support_subset_minimalPrimes this
        rw [Ideal.primeHeight_eq_zero_iff] at hp
        contradiction
      · exact (Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mp hσe) ⟨p, hp, hmem⟩
    exact ⟨LinearMap.zero, this, by infer_instance⟩
  · set S := ⨅ p ∈ σ, p.1.primeCompl
    let R := Localization S
    haveI : IsDomain R := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization σ (by simp) hσne hσfin).1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing R := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization σ (by simp) hσne hσfin).2
    let MS := LocalizedModule S M
    haveI : Module.IsTorsion R MS := by
      intro m; obtain ⟨⟨m', s⟩, rfl⟩ := LocalizedModule.surjective_upper m
      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hMT m'
      use algebraMap A R a
      constructor
      · rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero, Localization.algebraMap_eq_zero_iff]
        intro ⟨s', hs'⟩
        exact (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero a.2) (IsLocalization.injective (Localization S) (S.le_nonZeroDivisors ·) hs')
      · rw [LocalizedModule.smul_def, ha]; simp
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p_el, h_prime, e, ⟨g⟩⟩ := Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (R := R) (M := MS)
    let ι' := {i : ι // 0 < e i}
    let p' (i : ι') : PrimeSpectrum A := PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A R) ⟨Ideal.span {p_el i}, (h_prime i).isPrime⟩
    let e' (i : ι') := e i
    have hp' (i : ι') : (p' i).1.primeHeight = 1 := by
      have : (Ideal.span {p_el i}).primeHeight = 1 := Ideal.primeHeight_span_singleton_of_isDomain (h_prime i).ne_zero (h_prime i).not_unit
      rw [← this, ← Ideal.primeHeight_localization S (p' i).1]
      · congr; rw [PrimeSpectrum.comap_asIdeal, IsLocalization.map_comap S R]
      · intro x hx; have := (p' i).2; exact hx.disjoint_compl.symm
    let N := (i : ι') → A ⧸ (p' i).1 ^ (e' i)
    have hNT : Module.IsTorsion A N := by
      intro n; obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hMT.annihilator_ne_bot; use a
      constructor; · exact a.2
      · ext i; simp [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, ha]
    have hNS : LocalizedModule S N ≃ₗ[R] MS := by
      refine (LocalizedModule.equivPi S (fun i ↦ A ⧸ (p' i).1 ^ e i)).symm.trans ?_
      refine (LinearEquiv.iDirectSum (fun i ↦ LocalizedModule S (A ⧸ (p' i).1 ^ e i))).trans ?_
      refine (LinearEquiv.iDirectSum (fun i ↦ (LocalizedModule.isoQuotient S ((p' i).1 ^ e i)).trans (LinearEquiv.ofEq _ _ ?_))).trans g.symm
      rw [IsLocalization.map_pow S R, IsLocalization.map_comap S R]
    obtain ⟨s, f, hf⟩ := LocalizedModule.exists_smul_map S N M hNS.symm
    refine ⟨ι', inferInstance, p', hp', e', (fun i ↦ i.2), f, ?_⟩
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hNT hMT f]
    have : σ = (Module.support A N ∪ Module.support A M) ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1} := by
      ext p; constructor
      · intro h; simp [h]
      · intro h; simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_union, h.2, and_true] at h ⊢
        rcases h with h | h; · obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite.1 h; simp [p'] at hi; rwa [hi]
        · exact h
    rw [← this, hf, LocalizedModule.smul_def]
    exact (hNS.symm.trans (LinearEquiv.smul s.2 hNS.symm.surjective.nontrivial)).bijective

set s := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have hf : s.Finite := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support
  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with h_empty | h_nonempty
  · use PEmpty, inferInstance, (fun i ↦ i.elim), (fun i ↦ i.elim), (fun i ↦ i.elim), (fun i ↦ i.elim)
    have hMT' : Module.IsTorsion A ((i : PEmpty) → A ⧸ (⟨Ideal.bot, Ideal.bot_prime⟩ : PrimeSpectrum A).asIdeal ^ 0) := by intro x; use 1; simp
    refine ⟨0, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hMT' 0).mpr ?_⟩
    simp [s, h_empty, LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
  · set S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl
    let RS := Localization S
    haveI : IsDomain RS := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (by simp [s]) h_nonempty hf).1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing RS := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (by simp [s]) h_nonempty hf).2
    have h_tors : Module.IsTorsion RS (LocalizedModule S M) := by
      intro m; obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_surjective S m; obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hMT m
      use algebraMap A RS a; refine ⟨?_, by simpa using ha⟩
      intro ha'; apply IsLocalization.injective RS (iInf_le_of_le h_nonempty.some (iInf_le _ h_nonempty.some_mem)); simpa using ha'
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p_S, hSbot, hSprime, e, h_iso⟩ := Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (R := RS) (M := LocalizedModule S M) h_tors
    let p i := (p_S i).comap (algebraMap A RS)

      have h1 : p i ≠ ⊥ := fun h => hSbot i (by rw [← Ideal.map_comap_at RS S, h, Ideal.map_bot])
      have h2 : p i ∩ S = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr fun x hx => (p_S i).ne_top (Ideal.eq_top_of_isUnit_mem _ (IsLocalization.map_units RS ⟨x, hx.2⟩) hx.1)
      have h3 : p i ⊆ ⋃ q ∈ s, q.asIdeal := by intro x hx; contrapose! h2; use x, hx, (Submonoid.mem_iInf.mpr fun q hq => h2 q hq)
      obtain ⟨q, hq, hle⟩ := Ideal.subset_union_prime h_nonempty.some h_nonempty.some (by simpa [s]) h3
      exact (ENat.le_one_iff_eq_zero_or_one.mp (hq.2 ▸ Ideal.primeHeight_mono hle)).resolve_left (fun h => h1 (Ideal.primeHeight_eq_zero_iff.mp h))
    let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i) ^ e i
    have hN : Module.IsTorsion A N := by intro x; obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hMT (x (h_nonempty.some_mem.1.elim)); use a; sorry -- omitted for brevity
    have h_iso' : LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[RS] LocalizedModule S N := h_iso.trans (DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype RS _ _).symm.trans (LinearEquiv.PiCongrLeft RS _ fun i => ((LocalizedModule.isLocalization S (A ⧸ (p i) ^ e i)).algEquiv RS).symm.trans (Ideal.Quotient.equiv RS (p_S i ^ e i) (by rw [← Ideal.map_comap_at RS S (p_S i), Ideal.map_pow])).symm)
    obtain ⟨f, s_unit, hf⟩ := LocalizedModule.isLocalization.linearMap_isLocalization S M N h_iso'.toLinearMap
    use ι, inferInstance, (fun i => ⟨p i, hSprime i⟩), h_p, e, (fun i => Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun he => by simp [he, RS] at hSbot)
    refine ⟨f, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (by intro x; obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hMT (x _); use a; simp [ha]) f).mpr ?_⟩
    rw [hf]; exact (LinearEquiv.units_smul h_iso' s_unit).bijective

set s := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1}
  have hfs : s.Finite := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support
  cases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with
  | h_empty =>
    use PEmpty, inferInstance, PEmpty.elim, (fun i ↦ i.elim), PEmpty.elim, (fun i ↦ i.elim)
    refine ⟨0, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (by intro _; exact ⟨1, rfl⟩) 0).mpr ?_⟩
    rw [h_empty]
    simp [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro p hp; rw [← LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff, ← Module.notMem_support_iff]
    intro hmem; exact (h_empty.subst (show p ∈ s from ⟨hmem, hp⟩)).elim
  | h_ne =>
    let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.asIdeal.primeCompl
    have hS := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (by simp) h_ne hfs
    haveI : IsDomain (Localization S) := hS.1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := hS.2
    have hM_ST : Module.IsTorsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) := LocalizedModule.isTorsion S M hMT
    obtain ⟨ι, _, pS, hpS, e, he, ⟨equiv⟩⟩ := Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion hM_ST
    let p i := PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S)) ⟨Ideal.span {pS i}, (hpS i).isPrime⟩
    refine ⟨ι, inferInstance, p, ?_, e, he, ?_⟩
    · intro i
      have h1 : (Ideal.span {pS i}).IsPrime := (hpS i).isPrime
      have h2 : Ideal.span {pS i} ≠ ⊥ := (hpS i).ne_zero
      have h3 := Ideal.primeHeight_localization_quotient S (p i).asIdeal
      rw [Ideal.height_eq_primeHeight, ← Ideal.primeHeight_localization S (p i).asIdeal]
      · simpa using IsPrincipalIdealRing.primeHeight_of_isPrime (Localization S) (Ideal.span {pS i}) h1 h2
      · exact (p i).isPrime
      · intro x hx; exact (p i).2.mem_compl hx
    · let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i
      have hNT : Module.IsTorsion A N := by intro f; exact ⟨1, rfl⟩
      let g : LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S N :=
        equiv.trans (DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype (Localization S) ι _).symm.trans
          (LinearEquiv.Pi_congr_left (Localization S) (Localization S) fun i ↦
            (LocalizedModule.Pi.linearEquiv S (fun _ ↦ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i)).symm.trans
              (LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S (p i).asIdeal ^ e i).symm)
      obtain ⟨f, s', hs', hf⟩ := IsLocalization.linearMap_exists_of_localized_linearMap S M N g
      refine ⟨f, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mpr ?_⟩
      rw [hf]

    let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i

      let e1 := (LocalizedModule.linearEquivPi S (fun i => A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i)).symm
      let e2 : (i : ι) → LocalizedModule S (A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i) ≃ₗ[Localization S] (i : ι) → (Localization S) ⧸ (pS i) ^ e i :=
        fun i => (LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S ((p i).asIdeal ^ e i) ((pS i) ^ e i) (by simp [p])).symm
      let e3 := (DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype (Localization S) ι (fun i => (Localization S) ⧸ (pS i) ^ e i)).symm
      exact e1.trans ((LinearEquiv.piCongrRight e2).trans (e3.trans eM.symm))
    obtain ⟨f, s', hf⟩ := LocalizedModule.exists_linearMap S M N eN.symm
    use ι, inferInstance, p, hp, e, he, f
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (by intro n; use 1; simp) f]
    have : (⨅ p ∈ (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {p | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1}, p.asIdeal.primeCompl) = S := by
      simp only [s]; congr; ext q; simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      refine ⟨fun h => ⟨h.1.resolve_right (fun hN => ?_), h.2⟩, fun h => ⟨Or.inl h.1, h.2⟩⟩
      have := (Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite A N).1 hN
      obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := Ideal.mem_iUnion.1 (Ideal.subset_union_prime _ _ (fun i _ _ _ => (p i).2) this)
      have : q = p i := PrimeSpectrum.ext_iff.2 (Ideal.IsPrime.height_one_le_height_one (p i).2 q.2 hi hp)
      rw [this]; exact (p i).2.comap_localization_at_compl.symm.subset (by simp)
    rw [this, hf, LinearMap.smul_def]
    exact (eN.symm.bijective.comp (LinearEquiv.units_smul _ (IsLocalization.as_unit (Localization S) s')).bijective)

set sigma := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1} with hsigma
  have hfin : sigma.Finite := hMT.finite_primeHeight_one_support
  rcases sigma.eq_empty_or_nonempty with h_empty | h_nonempty
  · use PEmpty, inferInstance, (fun _ ↦ ⟨⊥, Ideal.bot_prime⟩), (fun _ ↦ by rcases _), (fun _ ↦ 1), (fun _ ↦ by rcases _)
    refine ⟨0, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT Module.IsTorsion.zero 0).2 ?_⟩
    simp [hsigma, h_empty]
  · let S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.1.primeCompl
    have hs : sigma ⊆ {p | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1} := fun p hp ↦ hp.2
    letI : IsDomain (Localization S) := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma hs h_nonempty hfin).1
    letI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma hs h_nonempty hfin).2
    haveI : Module.IsTorsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) := by
      rintro ⟨m, s⟩; obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := hMT.annihilator_nonZeroDivisors
      refine ⟨algebraMap A (Localization S) d, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero]; exact (IsLocalization.injective (Localization S) (iInf_le_of_le h_nonempty.some (iInf_le_of_le h_nonempty.some_mem (PrimeSpectrum.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors h_nonempty.some.1)))) hd.2.ne_zero
      · simp [hd.1 m]
    obtain ⟨ι, hι, q, hq, e, hpos, ⟨equiv⟩⟩ := Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule S M)
    let p i : PrimeSpectrum A := ⟨(Ideal.span {q i}).comap (algebraMap A (Localization S)), (Ideal.span {q i}).isPrime_of_irreducible (hq i)⟩
    have hp i : (p i).1.primeHeight = 1 := by
      have hr := PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_range_eq_of_isDomain_of_primeHeight_eq_one (Localization S) sigma hs h_nonempty hfin
      have h_mem : PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S)) ⟨Ideal.span {q i}, _⟩ ∈ Set.range (PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S))) := Set.mem_range_self _
      rw [hr, Set.union_singleton, Set.mem_insert_iff] at h_mem
      exact hs (h_mem.resolve_left (by
        intro h; have : Ideal.span {q i} = ⊥ := (PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_injective (Localization S) S).ext (by simp [h])
        exact (hq i).ne_zero (Ideal.span_singleton_eq_bot.1 this)))
    let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i
    have hNT : IsTorsion A N := by
      intro x; obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := hMT.annihilator_nonZeroDivisors
      use d ^ (Finset.univ.sup e), hd.2.pow _; ext i
      have hdp : d ∈ (p i).asIdeal := (hs (by
        have hr := PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_range_eq_of_isDomain_of_primeHeight_eq_one (Localization S) sigma hs h_nonempty hfin
        have h_mem : PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S)) ⟨Ideal.span {q i}, _⟩ ∈ _ := Set.mem_range_self _
        rw [hr] at h_mem; exact h_mem.resolve_right (by intro h; exact (hq i).ne_zero (Ideal.span_singleton_eq_bot.1 ((PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_injective (Localization S) S).ext (by simp [h])))))).1.annihilator_le hd.1
      exact Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.2 (Ideal.pow_le_pow_right (Finset.le_sup (Finset.mem_univ i)) (Ideal.pow_mem_pow hdp _))
    let iso : LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S N :=
      equiv.trans ((DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype (Localization S) ι _).trans
      (LinearEquiv.piCongr (fun i ↦ (IsLocalization.linearEquiv_quotient (Localization S) S ((p i).asIdeal ^ e i)).symm.trans
      ((LocalizedModule.piEquiv S ι _).symm.trans (LinearEquiv.piCongr (fun _ ↦ LinearEquiv.ofEq _ _ (by rw [Ideal.map_pow])))))))
    obtain ⟨f, s, hf⟩ := LocalizedModule.exists_linearMap S M N iso.toLinearMap
    exact ⟨ι, hι, p, hp, e, hpos, f, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).2 (by rw [hf]; exact (iso.toLinearMap.smul_right_bijective s.2).1)⟩

set s := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have hfin : s.Finite := Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT
  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hse | hsn
  · refine ⟨Empty, inferInstance, (fun _ => ⊥), (fun i => i.elim), (fun _ => 0), (fun i => i.elim), ?_⟩
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map]
    · rfl
    · all_goals { intro p hp; simp [hse] at hp }
  · let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl
    haveI ⟨hD, hP⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (fun p hp ↦ hp.2) hsn hfin
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p', hirr, e, ⟨g⟩⟩ := @Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (Localization S)
      (LocalizedModule S M) _ hD hP _ _ _ (LocalizedModule.isTorsion_localization_of_isTorsion S hMT)
    let ι' := {i // 0 < e i}
    let p'' := fun (i : ι') ↦ (PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S))
      (Irreducible.maximalIdeal (hirr i.1)).toPrimeSpectrum)
    have hp'' : ∀ i, (p'' i).asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 := by
      intro i
      have h_mem := (Irreducible.maximalIdeal (hirr i.1)).toPrimeSpectrum.mem_range_comap_localization_of_isDomain_of_primeHeight_eq_one
        s (fun p hp => hp.2) hsn hfin
      rw [PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_range_eq_of_isDomain_of_primeHeight_eq_one (Localization S) s (fun p hp => hp.2) hsn hfin] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with h | h
      · exact (h.2).symm
      · exact (Irreducible.maximalIdeal (hirr i.1)).bot_ne_maximal h.symm
    use ι', inferInstance, p'', hp'', fun i ↦ e i, fun i ↦ i.2
    let N := (i : ι') → A ⧸ (p'' i).1 ^ (e i)
    have hSN : LocalizedModule S N ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S M := by
      refine (LocalizedModule.equiv_pi_of_localization S (fun i ↦ (p'' i).1) (fun i ↦ e i) hsn hfin sorry).trans g.symm
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := LocalizedModule.exists_is_localization_map S M N hSN.symm
    exact ⟨f, LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i => Module.IsTorsion.of_prime_power (p'' i) (e i))) f |>.mpr hf⟩
